---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Vespera
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the need or use case.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches.

**Notes**
Keep in mind Vespera stays distro-agnostic, degrades gracefully when optional
tools are absent, and collects no telemetry.
